author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v4.3.0
body: * reset page with multi index ([algolia/react-instantsearch#665](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/665)) ([b54e104](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/b54e104)) * **SearchBox:** use hidden over style to hide loader ([algolia/react-instantsearch#714](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/714)) ([4e0eba2](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/4e0eba2)) * test recipes ([algolia/react-instantsearch#740](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/740)) ([43f6329](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/43f6329)) * track all index in the manager ([algolia/react-instantsearch#660](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/660)) ([a2cd8d8](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/a2cd8d8)) * loading indicator ([algolia/react-instantsearch#544](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/544)) ([6bd0828](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/6bd0828)) * **Highlight:** support array of strings ([algolia/react-instantsearch#715](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/715)) ([f6f5fc7](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/f6f5fc7))
